Case Law Cited
Kasabai Tukaram Karvar and Others v. Nivruti (Dead) Through 
Legal Heirs and Others, 2022 INSC 733 : [2022] 5 SCR 899 : 
2022 SCC Online 918; Shripad Gajanan Suthankar v. Dattaram

701 – referred to.
